steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student needs the release year of Zelda II: The Adventure of Link, developed by Nintendo EAD. The answer comes directly from reading the corresponding row in the table.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 1982.: 1982 is the release year of a different game in the table, not Zelda II. ✗
  • Choice B — 1987.: The table lists 1987 as the release year for Zelda II: The Adventure of Link by Nintendo EAD. This matches the game the student is researching. ✓
  • Choice C — 1984.: 1984 is the release year of another game in the table, not Zelda II. ✗
  • Choice D — 1988.: 1988 is the release year of yet another game in the table, not Zelda II. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
